name: PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk
summary: PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk produces and distributes rice in Indonesia. It supplies rice to supermarkets, hypermarkets, and other retail networks under the LIMAS, HOKI, Topi Koki, BPS, and Belida brand names; and broken rice to vermicelli plants. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Buyung Investama Gemilang.
